'''Gshkaath''' was one of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguards along with [[Ezrakh]]. He died of the [[Death Seed]] plague when the [[Borealis (cruiser)|''Borealis'']] was infected with it in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}
